text_original: He who stands on his tiptoes does not stand firm;
text_normalized: He who stands on his tiptoes does not stand firm;

text_original: he who stretches his legs does not walk (easily).
text_normalized: he who stretches his legs does not walk (easily).

text_original: (So), he who displays himself does not shine;
text_normalized: (So), he who displays himself does not shine;

text_original: he who asserts his own views is not distinguished;
text_normalized: he who asserts his own views is not distinguished;

text_original: he who vaunts himself does not find his merit acknowledged;
text_normalized: he who vaunts himself does not find his merit acknowledged;

text_original: he who is self- conceited has no superiority allowed to him.
text_normalized: he who is self- conceited has no superiority allowed to him.

text_original: Such conditions, viewed from the standpoint of the Dao, are like remnants of food, or a tumour on the body, which all dislike.
text_normalized: Such conditions, viewed from the standpoint of the Dao, are like remnants of food, or a tumour on the body, which all dislike.

text_original: Hence those who pursue (the course) of the Dao do not adopt and allow them.
text_normalized: Hence those who pursue (the course) of the Dao do not adopt and allow them.
